attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 BATCH_ID,
 DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
 OPTY_NUMBER,
 SUBMIT_DATE,
 SUBMIT_NUMBER,
 SUBMIT_BY,
 APPR_ROUTE_HISTORY,
 REASON_FOR_APPROVAL,
 PRODUCT_FAMILY,
 SOTD_REASON,
 COMMENTS,
 PRICING_BAND,
 FINAL_BAND,
 DEAL_APPROVAL,
 CREATE_DATETIME ,
 ACTION_CODE,
 'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE,
 SS_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CQ_DEAL_SUBMIT_H EXCQSUB
 WHERE EXCQSUB.SS_CODE IN ('CCW', 'CCWR')
 AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL 
  WHERE DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID=EXCQSUB.OPTY_NUMBER)

SELECT 
 BATCH_ID,
 DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
 OPTY_NUMBER,
 SUBMIT_DATE,
 SUBMIT_NUMBER,
 SUBMIT_BY,
 APPR_ROUTE_HISTORY,
 REASON_FOR_APPROVAL,
 PRODUCT_FAMILY,
 SOTD_REASON,
 COMMENTS,
 PRICING_BAND,
 FINAL_BAND,
 DEAL_APPROVAL,
 CREATE_DATETIME ,
 ACTION_CODE,
 SS_CODE
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CQ_DEAL_SUBMIT_H ST
 WHERE ST.SS_CODE IN ('CCW', 'CCWR')
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OPTY_NUMBER,SUBMIT_NUMBER ORDER BY SUBMIT_DATE DESC )=1

select 
COALESCE(BK_DEAL_ID, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID,
COALESCE(SUBMIT_NUMBER, -999) as BK_SUBMIT_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(SUBMIT_DATE, DATE'3500-01-01') as DEAL_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SUBMITTED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY,
COALESCE(APPR_ROUTE_HISTORY, 'UNKNOWN') as APPROVAL_ROUTE_HIST_TXT,
COALESCE(REASON_FOR_APPROVAL, 'UNKNOWN') as REASON_FOR_APPROVAL_TXT,
COALESCE(SOTD_REASON, 'UNKNOWN') as RESUBMISSION_REASON_TXT,
COALESCE(PRODUCT_FAMILY, 'UNKNOWN') as PRODUCT_FAMILY_DESC,
COALESCE(PRICING_BAND, 'UNKNOWN') as PRICING_BAND_THRESHOLD_DESC,
COALESCE(FINAL_BAND, 'UNKNOWN') as FINAL_BAND_DESC,
COALESCE(COMMENTS, 'UNKNOWN') as RESUBMITTED_DEAL_COMMENTS_TXT,
'Y' AS LAST_SUBMITTED_RECORD_FLG ,
COALESCE(DEAL_APPROVAL, 'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_APRVL_SBMSN_HIST_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'UNKNOWN' AS FINAL_BAND_CD,
ACTION_CODE as ACTION_CODE,
'I' as DML_TYPE
from 
(
select 
DEAL_OBJECT_ID,                
OPTY_NUMBER ,
SUBMIT_NUMBER, 
SUBMIT_DATE ,
SUBMIT_BY ,
APPR_ROUTE_HISTORY ,
REASON_FOR_APPROVAL ,
SOTD_REASON ,
PRODUCT_FAMILY ,
PRICING_BAND ,
FINAL_BAND ,
COMMENTS ,
DEAL_APPROVAL,
ACTION_CODE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_CQ_DEAL_SUBMIT_H
UNION ALL

select 
DEAL_OBJECT_ID,                
OPTY_NUMBER ,
SUBMIT_NUMBER, 
SUBMIT_DATE ,
SUBMIT_BY ,
APPR_ROUTE_HISTORY ,
REASON_FOR_APPROVAL ,
SOTD_REASON ,
PRODUCT_FAMILY ,
PRICING_BAND ,
FINAL_BAND ,
COMMENTS ,
DEAL_APPROVAL,
ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CQ_DEAL_SUBMIT_H 
)CQSUB 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL 
ON DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT=CQSUB.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY CISCO
ON CQSUB.SUBMIT_BY=CISCO.CEC_ID
